Hero.badge: ✨ Next-Gen AI Exam Assistant is Live
Hero.desc: ExamHelper combines cutting-edge AI to provide smart problem solving, syllabus extraction, and study advice to help you ace any exam.

aiDiagnostic.title: AI Live Diagnostic
aiDiagnostic.advice: Need help? Remember, the total area under any valid PDF is 1. Does symmetry give you a hint?
aiDiagnostic.question: Does from -inf to 0 mean I only look at half the curve?
aiDiagnostic.answer: Exactly! Since the Gaussian curve is perfectly symmetric about the mean (μ=0), both halves must have equal area.

outline.title: Syllabus Management
outline.desc: Manage the list of exam syllabi and the knowledge relationship map.

deleteDialog.title: Delete Syllabus?
deleteDialog.desc: Are you absolutely sure? This will permanently delete the syllabus, all its associated nodes, and any linked staging data. This action cannot be undone.

wizard.title: AI Intelligent Extraction
wizard.subtitle: Define Examination Syllabus
wizard.desc: Use our Multi-Agent engine to extract hierarchical knowledge points from raw text.
wizard.namePlaceholder: e.g. 2026 Advanced Mathematics for Graduate Entrance
wizard.processingDesc: The AI engine is currently traversing the syllabus document tree and identifying core requirements.

knowledgeTree.subtitle: Knowledge Tree
knowledgeTree.emptyDesc: This outline has no knowledge nodes yet. Generate the tree first.

staging.title: Audit & Staging Pool
staging.desc: Reviewing AI-generated content for curriculum alignment.

messages.solutionError: Incorrect solution generated. Calculated y=5, but input requires y=4.

add.title: Add New Questions
add.desc: Paste your question document, AI will automatically recognize types and check for duplicates.
add.contentPlaceholder: Paste your questions here... (Supports PDF, Markdown or Plain Text)
add.successDesc: Questions imported successfully to staging pool.

Admin.title: System Management
Admin.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this user? This will prevent them from logging in and cannot be undone.

hero.title: Master Your Exams with Multi-Agent Intelligence.
hero.desc: The AI-powered study workspace that ingests your syllabus, debates every question, and maps your path to 100% mastery.

ecosystem.title: The Multi-Agent Ecosystem
ecosystem.desc: Our proprietary AI architecture features specialized agents that collaborate to ensure your cognitive success.

agent1.title: Outline-Agent
agent1.desc: Syllabus ingestion. Automatically breaks down complex curriculum into digestible knowledge nodes.

agent2.title: Debate-Agent Cluster
agent2.desc: Collaborative tagging. Multiple AI agents debate the nuances of each question to provide verified insights.

agent3.title: Gen-Agent
agent3.desc: Personalized question generation. Creates targeted challenges based on your unique weak points.

knowledgeMap.title: Your Brain, Mapped.
knowledgeMap.desc: Visualize your intellectual progress through an interactive neural network. Our Knowledge Map tracks every concept, connection, and mastery level in real-time.

diagnostics.title: Real-time AI Diagnostics
diagnostics.desc: Move beyond simple "right or wrong." Our diagnostics detect cognitive fallacies, common misconceptions, and optimize your study sessions using scientific Ebbinghaus scheduling.

feature1.title: Cognitive Error Tracking
feature1.desc: Identify if your mistakes are calculation-based or fundamental concept gaps.

feature2.title: Ebbinghaus Scheduling
feature2.desc: Automated review cycles that launch exactly when your retention is predicted to dip.

pricing.title: Investment in Mastery
pricing.subtitle: Choose the tier that aligns with your academic goals.

footer.desc: Pioneering editorial precision in the age of artificial intelligence for the modern student.
